HELP_CENTER.TITLE: Help Center
HELP_CENTER.WELCOME: Welcome to the Safar Morocco Help Center
HELP_CENTER.SUBTITLE: Everything you need to know about using our platform.
HELP_CENTER.NAVIGATE_DESC: Our platform is designed to be intuitive. Use the navigation bar to explore destinations, find upcoming events, or view your personalized itineraries on the interactive map.
HELP_CENTER.ITINERARIES_DESC: Go to the "Itineraries" section to start planning your trip. You can add destinations, set dates, and organize your daily activities easily.
HELP_CENTER.BOOKING_DESC: Discover local festivals, workshops, and tours in the "Events" section. Simply select an event and follow the booking process to secure your spot.
HELP_CENTER.RESERVATIONS_DESC: Access your profile to view and manage all your active reservations, past trips, and saved destinations.

PRIVACY_POLICY.TITLE: Privacy Policy
PRIVACY_POLICY.SEC1_DESC: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you create an account, make a reservation, or contact us for support.
PRIVACY_POLICY.SEC2_DESC: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services, including processing your reservations and sending you travel updates.
PRIVACY_POLICY.SEC3_DESC: Your reservation details and personal information are handled with strict confidentiality and are only shared with relevant partners (like event organizers) to facilitate your bookings.
PRIVACY_POLICY.SEC4_DESC: Public reviews and ratings you provide will be visible to other users of the platform to help them make informed travel decisions.
PRIVACY_POLICY.SEC5_DESC: We implement a variety of security measures to maintain the safety of your personal information when you enter, submit, or access your personal information.

TERMS_OF_SERVICE.TITLE: Terms of Service
TERMS_OF_SERVICE.SEC1_DESC: By accessing and using Safar Morocco, you agree to bound by these Terms of Service and all applicable laws and regulations.
TERMS_OF_SERVICE.SEC2_DESC: Permission is granted to temporarily download one copy of the materials on Safar Morocco's website for personal, non-commercial transitory viewing only.
TERMS_OF_SERVICE.SEC3_DESC: Users are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of their accounts and for all activities that occur under their account.
TERMS_OF_SERVICE.SEC4_DESC: Users may post reviews and photos. By doing so, you grant Safar Morocco a non-exclusive, royalty-free license to use, reproduce, and display such content.
TERMS_OF_SERVICE.SEC5_DESC: Safar Morocco may revise these terms of service for its website at any time without notice.

TERMS_AND_CONDITIONS.TITLE: Terms & Conditions
TERMS_AND_CONDITIONS.SEC1_CONTENT: Welcome to Safar Morocco, your premier platform for discovering and booking unique travel experiences across the Kingdom. By accessing or using our website, services, or mobile applications, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, please refrain from using our platform.
TERMS_AND_CONDITIONS.SEC2_CONTENT: To access certain features of Safar Morocco, you must create an account. You agree to:
TERMS_AND_CONDITIONS.SEC2_POINT1: Provide accurate, current, and complete information during the registration process.
TERMS_AND_CONDITIONS.SEC2_POINT2: Maintain and promptly update your account information.
TERMS_AND_CONDITIONS.SEC2_POINT3: Protect your login credentials and maintain the security of your password.
TERMS_AND_CONDITIONS.SEC2_POINT4: Accept all risks of unauthorized access to your account based on your failure to protect your credentials.
TERMS_AND_CONDITIONS.SEC3_CONTENT: Safar Morocco facilitates bookings for various tourism activities and accommodations. Please note that:
TERMS_AND_CONDITIONS.SEC3_POINT1: All reservations made through our platform are subject to availability and confirmation by the service provider.
TERMS_AND_CONDITIONS.SEC3_POINT2: Prices and availability are subject to change without notice until a booking is confirmed.
TERMS_AND_CONDITIONS.SEC3_POINT3: The platform acts as an intermediary; the contract for service is directly between you and the service provider.
TERMS_AND_CONDITIONS.SEC4_CONTENT: You agree not to misuse the platform. Prohibited activities include, but are not limited to:
TERMS_AND_CONDITIONS.SEC4_POINT1: Attempting to gain unauthorized access to our systems or other users' accounts.
TERMS_AND_CONDITIONS.SEC4_POINT2: Publishing harmful, offensive, or illegal content.
TERMS_AND_CONDITIONS.SEC4_POINT3: Using the platform for any fraudulent or malicious purposes.
TERMS_AND_CONDITIONS.SEC4_POINT4: Interfering with the proper working of the platform or its security features.
TERMS_AND_CONDITIONS.SEC5_CONTENT: At Safar Morocco, we value your privacy. We collect user information such as name, email, and activity data primarily to:
TERMS_AND_CONDITIONS.SEC5_POINT2: Personalize your experience on the platform.
TERMS_AND_CONDITIONS.SEC5_POINT3: Communicate with you regarding your bookings and offers.
TERMS_AND_CONDITIONS.SEC5_FOOTER: For more details on how we handle your data, please read our
TERMS_AND_CONDITIONS.SEC6_CONTENT: Users are encouraged to share their experiences through reviews and ratings. However:
TERMS_AND_CONDITIONS.SEC6_POINT1: You represent that you own or have the necessary rights to the content you post.
TERMS_AND_CONDITIONS.SEC6_POINT2: Safar Morocco reserves the right to remove any content deemed inappropriate, offensive, or in violation of these terms.
TERMS_AND_CONDITIONS.SEC6_POINT3: By posting content, you grant us a non-exclusive license to use it for promotional purposes.
TERMS_AND_CONDITIONS.SEC7_CONTENT: Safar Morocco reserves the right to update or modify these terms at any time. We will notify users of significant changes, and your continued use of the platform after such changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
TERMS_AND_CONDITIONS.SEC8_CONTENT: If you have any questions or concerns regarding these Terms and Conditions, please contact us at:
